prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria with structured assessment and exclusion of medical causes

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: moderate; primary care identification supported in many countries
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to CBT and SSRIs/SNRIs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Structured pathways and access to psychotherapy in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT + SSRIs/SNRIs; limited benzodiazepine use; stepped-care models common
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability across member states and wait times for psychotherapy in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong guideline infrastructure and broad access to evidence-based psychotherapy
